text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation entering this modern space, marked by glass walls and clear signs of technology and safety. The environment is clean, organized, and slightly impersonal, inviting curiosity about what lies beyond the entrance. Stepping further, I am drawn to the colorful wall of the R+D space, which speaks of innovation and the ever-evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines. There is an intellectual energy here, a call to reflect on progress, coexistence, and the boundaries between human ingenuity and artificial intelligence. I feel engaged, contemplative, and a little in awe at the endless possibilities this space suggests.
